description: A curse that makes one too meek to !bully anyone.
A curse that prevents one from achieving !climax.
Eww, cooties! No one will !kiss, !cuddle, or !handhold someone with cooties.
A curse that locks someone in costume, no matter how much they want to !dressup as something else. Will apply a random outfit if they are not wearing one at time of cursing.
A curse that ensures no matter how hard one tries, their !work and !volunteer efforts will yield no currency.
A curse that makes it impossible to gather the energy necessary to !train.
A curse that prevents one from enjoying food, no matter who tries to !feed them.
A curse that makes one unable to bear the thought of giving anyone their fair !pay
A curse that makes it difficult to form a meaningful !bond
A curse that will leave everyone wondering whether you're really a cow.
It's not like I made this curse just for you, I just had an extra one laying around, ok?!?!
Be honest, it's not the curse making you horny, is it?
Everyone is buzzzing about this curse.
